task: Certificate of Insurance PDF — GET /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/coi returns Puppeteer-rendered PDF; frontend Download COI button on PolicyDetail. Read-only, no schema changes, no financial writes.
name: Certificate of Insurance (COI) PDF

changes.summary: New Puppeteer-based COI PDF renderer. Queries insurance.policy + insurance.policy_unit JOIN mdata.assets + org.companies. Renders HTML with carrier name, policy number, coverage type, term dates, covered units (unit code, type, year, make, model, VIN, insured value), total insured value. Returns { pdfBuffer, filename, mimeType, sha256 }. Read-only — no writes.

Added GET /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/coi endpoint. RLS-scoped via withCompanyScope. Returns application/pdf with Content-Disposition: attachment. Returns 404 if policy not found, 500 on render failure.
Added downloadInsuranceCoiPdf(policyId, operatingCompanyId) — raw fetch, blobs the PDF response, triggers browser download via createObjectURL.
Added Download COI button to policy detail header action row.
Vitest unit tests: null on policy not found, correct buffer/filename/sha256, handles zero units, sanitises special chars in filename.
